gold_facts.device: DEVICE (authoritative, from IP map): 10.0.0.3 = RTU-2, RTU (IEC-104 controlled station, GridCom GC-4000), zone ZONE-C, at Bus 4, controls breakers BR-2-4, BR-3-4, BR-4-5, BR-4-7, BR-4-9.
gold_facts.physical_consequence: no physical violation — consequence is loss of visibility/control only (grid absorbs the outage via redistribution; base-case headroom is large)
gold_facts.reportable: Reportable Cyber Security Incident (BES Cyber Asset) — CIP-008-6: notify E-ISAC/NCCIC within 1 hour
